prompt: Ultra-realistic full-body portrait of a confident young professional woman integrated directly into a Japanese manga page layout. She appears inside a tall vertical hero panel on the left, spanning almost the full page height, and feels visually connected to the surrounding story panels. She wears a sleek charcoal trench coat layered over a fitted black turtleneck and tailored wide-leg trousers, with leather ankle boots and a structured work bag. Her pose is stylish and confident, one hand lightly adjusting her coat collar, the other holding the bag, body slightly turned with one leg forward.\n\nOn the right side, create smaller black-and-white manga panels showing a day in her life in Tokyo: train station, office desk, creative meeting, coffee break, rainy street, and rooftop skyline. Make the woman feel like the main character of the page, as if the realistic figure exists inside the manga story, not outside it. Use strong ink lines, screentones, speech bubbles, motion lines, and cinematic panel storytelling. Blend the realistic subject naturally into the comic narrative while keeping her more detailed and visually dominant.
